german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant share of positions remains accessible without German proficiency, highlighting a notable imbalance in language requirements.

pm_type.title: Customer-facing PMs Dominate Role Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between customer-facing and core PM roles, highlighting an imbalance in project management focus.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: Over half of the positions are filled by senior-level professionals.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Employee Preferences
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of employees favor on-site work over remote and hybrid options.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 35% of roles require AI as a core responsibility, indicating high demand for AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Across Categories
industry.subtitle: No single category dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
